summary: Comprehensive testing of KOSTIN cosmetics e-commerce with 186 real products from MongoDB. Backend: 21/21 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical flows working correctly including products listing, category filtering, search, product detail, login, and admin panel.

issues: Product description shows raw HTML tags instead of rendered HTML (e.g., '<div data-test="description"...'). Should use dangerouslySetInnerHTML or strip HTML tags.
Some product images from wholesale supplier are broken/inaccessible (showing alt text). This is expected per context - wholesale supplier images may be unavailable.

action_items: Consider rendering product description HTML properly using dangerouslySetInnerHTML or stripping HTML tags in ProductDetail.jsx
critical_code_review_comments: Products API correctly returns 186 products with all required fields
wholesale_price field is properly hidden from API responses (security)
Category display names correct: 'Body Care' and 'Men's Care' (not 'Bodycare' and 'Menscare')
Category filtering works correctly via URL params (/products?category=perfumes)
Search functionality works across name, brand, and description fields
Sorting by name (default), price-low, price-high all working
Admin panel shows all 186 products with CRUD capabilities
Auth system working with httpOnly cookies
seed_data_creation: 186 real products imported from wholesale CSV into MongoDB. Products include: perfumes (71), skincare (25), haircare (25), menscare (25), makeup (20), bodycare (20).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 186 real products are in MongoDB and accessible via API. Products API fully functional with filtering, search, sorting, pagination. Category display names are correct. Admin panel shows all products. Some product images from wholesale supplier may be broken - this is expected. Product descriptions contain HTML that should be rendered properly.

frontend.test: Home page loads with real products from API
frontend.details: 8 products in new arrivals, 6 categories with correct names

frontend.test: Product detail page loads real data
frontend.details: Shows name, price, brand, stock, add to cart
